name: Potato Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, then add salt.
2. Add mashed potatoes and shortening that have been creamed together.
3. Incorporate the well-beaten egg.
4. Gradually mix in milk until a dough forms.
5. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface.
6. Pat into a sheet about 1/2 inch thick, or divide into three portions.
7. Roll each portion into rounds about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut each round into four pie-shaped pieces.
9. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
